name: Youjo Senki RPG
description:
A World War is brewing.

Your country calls. Will you answer?

⋘══════ ∘ ◦ ✧ 🕮 ✧ ◦ ∘ ══════⋙

Based on: Youjo Senki (Saga of Tanya the Evil)

Credit: Carlo Zen and Shinobu Shinotsuki

⋘══════ ∘ ◦ ✧ 🕮 ✧ ◦ ∘ ══════⋙

Salutations fellow chatters!

"When the shits getting harder than life, only then will you realize that life isn't so bad."

- Joosu (1:4)

Achtung!

Before I begin, I'd like to give thanks to three users that I've nearly always see in my review section. I wish nothing but the best for you three (and my now thousand followers, especially the one who followed last second when I was at 999.) and I hope I continue to see you all for the coming bots!

Thank you, @Tienrand

Thank you, @Tondavoltka

Thank you, @William Johnny (Flea)

(And for the tips on CSS for my profile page)

For my one thousand follower milestone, I have posted a bot that I've made and played with for quite long time. You may or may have not realized that I am a huge Youjo Senki nerd with how much I've been talking about it (plus the AO3 fanfic...). In fact, you may see me as more of a Youjo Senki megafan than an ORV megafan. I haven't done my ORV community right at all....That task, though, is for my ORV lovers to do on this site (THANK YOU @-R4Y- FOR THE ORV RPG! THANK YOU @OLDESTDREAM FOR JUST HAVING THAT NAME!).

Therefore, I made this bot, in hope that I bring more attention to my favourite anime. This isn't the first version, I made a few others when I first joined but I deleted them out of discontent of the quality. This one although was my best version and now that I have a proxy, it's gotten better.

Yes, all characters are 18+, although the bot DOES know that Youjo Senki exists and therefore will try to push that Tanya is her canon age with subtle hints. This is rare, thankfully. BUT, the bot WILL switch her canon age IF the USER says so. That is beyond my control and very disgusting to think about; if this bot does get banned for that, then well I can't do anything about it, seriously. I'll just enjoy my aerial mage battle
creator: Joosu
